articles.title: Sri Lanka’s Mattala Rajapaksa International Airport Refuses to Disappear
articles.excerpt: If Mattala is leased mainly to satisfy strategic anxieties, Colombo risks repeating its old mistake: treating geopolitical value as a substitute for commercial viability.
